creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-bugs->wpaul

The xl driver has changed a _lot_ from 3.x to 4.x. 

Bill, are you still maintaining xl for RELENG_3? 

Ravil, could you get a backtrace with debugging symbols?  You'll 
need a debugging kernel (``makeoptions DEBUG=-g'' in the 
kernel config file and config'd with config -g). 

Once you have one, have a look at the instructions at: 

http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/kerneldebug.html 

Be sure to send your follow-up to 
<freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org>, preserving the Subject      
line of this e-mail message. 

Of course, if xl is at the end of the line in RELENG_3, you 
might be better off upgrading to 4.1-RELEASE.
